series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Automated Rx Reporting System - Law Enforcement OARRS Histories
series_metadata.series_description: Look up history on prescribes and specific patients, requested from local law enforcement agencies. This is stored in OARRS as part of the record audit.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain on Ohio Automated Rx Reporting System server for 5 Years then delete., Electronic: Delete
